# hostinger_agency_hosting_website (Data Source)

Reads details for a single Agency Plan website.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uid` (String) Website UID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Website creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) Website description.
- `domains` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))
- `flavor` (String) Website flavor.
- `ipv4` (String) Website IPv4 address.
- `order` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--order))
- `preview_domain` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--preview_domain))
- `remote_access` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--remote_access))
- `server` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--server))
- `settings` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--settings))
- `staging_root` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--staging_root))
- `state` (String) Website state.
- `type` (String) Website type.
- `user` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--user))
- `wordpress` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--wordpress))

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Domain creation timestamp.
- `custom_ssl_cert` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains--custom_ssl_cert))
- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name.
- `ipv6` (String) IPv6 address.
- `nameservers` (List of String) List of nameservers for the domain.
- `parent_fqdn` (String) Parent fully qualified domain name.
- `ssl_cert` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains--ssl_cert))

<a id="nestedatt--domains--custom_ssl_cert"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains.custom_ssl_cert`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Custom SSL certificate creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) Custom SSL certificate expiration timestamp.
- `is_expired` (Boolean) Indicates if the custom SSL certificate is expired.


<a id="nestedatt--domains--ssl_cert"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains.ssl_cert`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) SSL certificate creation timestamp.
- `expires_at` (String) SSL certificate expiration timestamp.
- `names` (List of String) List of names covered by the SSL certificate.



<a id="nestedatt--order"></a>
### Nested Schema for `order`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Order creation timestamp.
- `id` (Number) Order ID.
- `plan` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--order--plan))
- `status` (String) Order status.

<a id="nestedatt--order--plan"></a>

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Plan name.
- `parameters` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--order--plan--parameters))

<a id="nestedatt--order--plan--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `order.plan.parameters`

Read-Only:

- `cpu_cores` (Number) CPU cores.
- `disk_iops_quota` (Number) Disk IOPS quota.
- `disk_quota_bytes` (Number) Disk quota in bytes.
- `inode_quota` (Number) Inode quota.
- `is_cdn_available` (Boolean) Indicates if CDN is available.
- `max_databases_per_website` (Number) Maximum databases per website.
- `memory_quota_bytes` (Number) Memory quota in bytes.
- `process_quota` (Number) Process quota.
- `website_quota` (Number) Website quota.

Read-Only:

- `fqdn` (String) Fully qualified domain name for the preview domain.
